overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a foggy night in a dystopian industrial district. The player navigates elevated metal walkways, engages in melee combat with enemies, and traverses vertical staircases illuminated by neon signs and emergency lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial walkway in foggy dystopian district

agents.ego_description: navigating elevated walkways through heavy fog, approaching a group of figures in the distance

entered.detail: large industrial building with orange fires burning on upper levels, partially obscured by thick fog
tall industrial crane with red warning lights, metal framework extending above the walkway
elevated metal grating pathway with safety railings, winding through the industrial complex
faint cyan neon signage visible through the fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy industrial night scene with fires burning in a distant building. The camera moves along elevated metal walkways, passing a large crane structure with red warning lights. The atmosphere is thick with smoke and fog, limiting visibility. The path leads toward a group of figures standing ahead on the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open platform with active combat encounter

events.description: player character engages in melee combat with multiple enemies on the platform
combat ends and character begins running toward the stairs

agents.ego_description: fighting multiple enemies with melee attacks on an open platform, then retreating toward stairs

notable_agents.action: enemy combatant attacking the player with melee weapons
companion ally fighting alongside the player

entered.detail: open concrete platform with blood stains and debris from fighting
staircase leading upward, illuminated by ambient light

segments.scene_description: The player encounters a group of enemies on an open platform and engages in melee combat. Blood stains mark the concrete ground as the player fights alongside an ally. After defeating the enemies, the character runs toward a metal staircase. The industrial crane with red lights remains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical industrial staircases and elevated walkways

events.description: character begins ascending metal staircases with companions

agents.ego_description: climbing multiple flights of metal stairs with companions, traversing elevated industrial walkways

notable_agents.action: companion following closely up the stairs

entered.detail: steep metal stairs with orange step lights, industrial grating construction
narrow metal walkway with safety railings overlooking the foggy district below
large vertical pipes running alongside the staircase structure

segments.scene_description: Following the combat, the player ascends steep metal staircases illuminated by orange lights. The group moves through narrow industrial corridors with large pipes and metal railings. The large crane structure shifts from the right to the left side of the frame as the camera circles around it, revealing more of the foggy industrial skyline with distant fires.

events.description: passing the AKEBONO neon sign and plastic chairs on a lower platform

agents.ego_description: descending metal stairs past neon signage, moving toward lower industrial levels

entered.detail: large cyan neon sign spelling 'AKEBONO' mounted on industrial structure
two white plastic chairs and a small table on a wooden platform
dark metal stairs leading downward with sparse orange lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the descent past a prominent cyan 'AKEBONO' neon sign. The player passes white plastic chairs on a wooden platform before continuing down dark metal staircases. The lighting shifts to darker tones with orange accent lights illuminating the steps. The industrial crane is now visible in the far distance as the camera moves deeper into the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a smoke-filled industrial district that shifts from an open, combat-torn walkway to the claustrophobic depths of a neon-lit structure. It begins on an elevated metal path amidst thick fog and distant fires, gliding past a large crane with red warning lights toward a group of waiting figures. As the camera reaches an open platform, the scene erupts into melee combat that leaves bloodstains on the concrete before the momentum carries the player toward a steep metal staircase. The perspective then ascends through narrow corridors of pipes and orange lighting, circling the crane to reveal a wider view of the foggy skyline before turning downward. Finally, the camera descends past a glowing cyan AKEBONO neon sign and wooden platforms, moving deeper into the dark industrial architecture as the distant crane fades into the haze.
